# Pencil Box
> A Notepad++ for your whiteboard — free browser whiteboard with auto-save, eight pen types, and no signup.

- [Home](https://pencilbox.netlify.app/): Landing page and whiteboard app
- [Privacy](https://pencilbox.netlify.app/#privacy): Data stays on your device; optional anonymous analytics
- [Source](https://github.com/Abhir1902/Pencil-box): Open-source repository

## Features
Eight pen types, dark mode, color wheel, undo/redo, chrome-style tabs, localStorage persistence.

## Tagline
A Notepad++ for your whiteboard.
